_description: Firefox Enterprise Policy — Force-install AIGO-X Browser Agent. Deploy via /etc/firefox/policies/policies.json (Linux/macOS) or Windows GPO with Mozilla ADMX template.

__EXTENSION_ID__@aigo-x.io.blocked_install_message: This extension is managed by your organisation and cannot be removed.

_managed_storage._note: Place this in /etc/firefox/policies/policies.json or the Mozilla ADMX registry path

_macos_deploy: sudo mkdir -p /Library/Application\ Support/Mozilla/ManagedStorage && sudo cp firefox-enterprise-policy.json /Library/Application\ Support/Mozilla/policies.json
_windows_deploy: Place policies.json in: C:\Program Files\Mozilla Firefox\distribution\policies.json
